label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Calm focuses on wellness and meditation content. Privacy policy is relatively straightforward. Data sharing is primarily for analytics and advertising, not for direct sales. Shares with advertising partners for behavioral targeting. Does not honor standard privacy signals.
